title: AI Research v4 + Fleet Dashboard Redesign
summary: Major overhaul of the AI Disruption Research page (70-stock curated universe, rebuilt scoring model, AI Impact Thesis with source citations) plus fleet dashboard redesign.

features.title: AI Research: Curated 70-Stock Universe
features.summary: Every stock now has a specific, defensible AI impact thesis. Non-thesis stocks removed, 9 quality SaaS names added.
features.description: Universe curated from 59 to 70 tickers across 18 industries. Removed 10 stocks that didn't fit (HIMS was DTC pharmacy not SaaS, insurance companies had no AI thesis, SMCI drawdown was accounting scandal). Added WDAY, KVYO, FRSH, RBRK, S, FROG, NTNX, PATH, BILL. Added Bain 'deterministic vs probabilistic' system type classification. 4 new industries: Healthcare IT, Vertical SaaS, E-Commerce Platforms, HR/Workforce Management.

features.title: AI Research: Rebuilt Scoring Model
features.summary: Fixed 5 scoring bugs including a +258% valuation error, news confidence weighting, and AI positioning bias.
features.description: 5 critical scoring fixes: (1) Multi-segment valuation cap — AMZN gap was +258%, now capped at 30%. (2) News confidence multiplier — stocks with 0 articles no longer get false NLP scores. (3) AI positioning score demeaned (mean was -0.46, now 0). (4) Valuation-adjusted dislocation — expensive stocks with small drawdowns don't score as 'dislocated'. (5) Rule of 40 integrated into fundamentals. 8 new columns: system_type, rule_of_40, revenue_per_employee, news_confidence, data_coverage_pct, valuation_confidence, is_multi_segment.

features.title: AI Research: Impact Thesis + Source Citations
features.summary: Each stock shows a specific AI thesis with clickable source links for key claims.
features.description: Every ticker now leads with a blue 'AI IMPACT THESIS' callout — a specific view on how AI changes that company. Theses name both bull and bear case. Top 20 tickers have clickable source links to SEC filings, earnings releases, and product announcements (e.g., Klaviyo $500M buyback 8-K, SentinelOne $1B ARR milestone, Workday 97% retention). Removed the redundant 'Signal Rationale' cards section.

features.title: Fleet Dashboard Redesign
features.summary: Replaced throttle gauges and duplicated tables with a summary bar, per-machine cards, and a unified research pipeline view.
features.description:
The fleet dashboard has been completely redesigned to fix several problems:

1. Removed the GPU Warp Speed and CPU Warp Speed throttle gauges -- they looked impressive but were misleading about actual utilization.

2. Replaced three duplicated data presentations (throttle bars, GPU table, CPU table) with a single set of per-machine cards. Each card shows GPU stats, CPU core utilization (used/total), and active processes in one place.

3. Fixed wrong core counts: gaming-pc now correctly shows 16 cores (i7-12700F) instead of 4, and garage-pc shows 24 cores (i7-14700K) instead of 4.

4. Added a compact fleet summary bar at the top showing GPU avg utilization, active CPU cores out of total, 24h attainment, and last checkin age.

5. Filtered out 0% CPU processes (like idle sweep_queue.py instances) that were adding noise.

6. Unified the research pipeline into Currently Running (all active jobs across all machines) and Recently Completed (merged GPU sweep results and CPU jobs into one table).

7. Historical utilization tables (GPU Daily 14d, GPU Weekly 8w, CPU Daily 7d) are preserved at the bottom with correct fleet core counts.
